commands.review_summary:
This PR wraps registry artifact backup `_index.json` merge/write operations in per-index Convex leases across publish, seed, retry, and repair paths, with focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from a live run. Current main can still route publish, seed, retry, and repair paths into the same conditional `_index.json` merge/write without a per-index lock.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This collaborator-authored PR has no narrow automation repair; the remaining action is maintainer review and optional Convex runtime validation before merge.

target.title: fix: serialize registry backup index writes
target.body:
## Summary
- serialize registry artifact backup `_index.json` writes with per-index Convex leases
- keep file/artifact uploads parallel; only the index merge/write is single-flight per skill/package root
- delete released per-index lease rows so full backfills do not permanently grow sync-state rows

## Why
Production retry drains after #2641 still failed with `_index.json changed too frequently` because different paths could still race on the same skill/package index object. This keeps conditional R2 writes intact but avoids same-index contention across publish, seed, retry, and index-repair paths.

## Proof
- `PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" bunx convex codegen`
- `PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" bunx vitest run convex/registryArtifactBackups.test.ts convex/lib/registryArtifactBackup.test.ts convex/crons.test.ts`
- `PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`
- `PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$PATH" bun run ci:static`
- `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD`
- `codex review --uncommitted` -> no actionable correctness issues
target.author: patrick-erichsen
